items.situation: student asking about course enrollment or prerequisites
items.speaker: Do I have to take statistics before this course?

options.A: Have you checked with your advisor yet?
options.B: Statistics is held in the math building.
options.C: I really enjoyed that course last term.
options.D: The textbook costs about forty dollars.

items.explanation: 正确答案 A 用一个反问推进对话，提示学生去咨询顾问以确认先修要求，这是自然且有帮助的回应。B 是语义联想陷阱，抓住关键词"statistics"却只描述上课地点，没回答是否为先修课。C 是离题但合语法的句子，表达个人感受，与先修问题无关。D 也是语义联想陷阱，抓住"course"扯到教材价格，答非所问。

items.situation: asking for directions to a nearby location
items.speaker: How do I get to the nearest pharmacy?

options.A: I picked up my prescription this morning.
options.B: Just turn left at the second light.
options.C: Are you feeling sick again today?
options.D: The pharmacy hired three new workers.

items.explanation: 正确答案 B 直接给出明确的方向指引，准确回答了"怎么走"的问题。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"pharmacy"扯到取药，没给方向。C 是答错问题类型，问的是"怎么走"却回问对方身体状况。D 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"pharmacy"描述其招聘情况，与路线无关。

items.speaker: Where are we going for your birthday this weekend?

options.A: My birthday was a lot of fun last year.
options.B: Yes, the weekend went by really fast.
options.C: Honestly, let's just stay in and order food.
options.D: The restaurant downtown was completely full.

items.explanation: 正确答案 C 以话语标记"Honestly"开头，间接但明确地提出在家点外卖的安排，自然回应了"去哪儿"的问题。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"birthday"回忆去年，没回答地点。B 是答错问题类型，把"where"当成对周末的评论。D 是离题但合语法，描述某餐厅满座，但并未回答两人要去哪里。

items.situation: asking a store clerk about a return or exchange
items.speaker: Can I return this shirt without the receipt?

options.A: The shirt comes in three other colors.
options.B: Yes, I bought a shirt here last week.
options.C: Did you enjoy wearing it this season?
options.D: Actually, store credit is all we can offer.

items.explanation: 正确答案 D 以话语标记"Actually"开头，间接告知没有小票只能退成购物额度，自然处理了退货请求。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"shirt"描述颜色款式，未回应能否退货。B 也是语义联想陷阱，抓住"shirt"讲自己买东西的经历，毫无帮助。C 是答错问题类型，问的是能否退货却反问穿着体验。

items.situation: student checking lost-and-found at front desk
items.speaker: What color was the wallet someone turned in?

options.A: Let me unlock the cabinet so you can look.
options.B: Brown is a very popular wallet color.
options.C: The desk closes at five every evening.
options.D: Have you reported it to campus security?

items.explanation: 正确答案 A 不直接回答颜色，而是转向解决学生的真正需求——打开柜子让其亲自辨认，这是 context_shift 范式的典型应对。B 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"wallet/color"泛谈颜色流行度，没帮上忙。C 是离题但合语法，讲服务台关门时间，与认领无关。D 是答错问题类型，把找钱包的请求转成是否报案的反问，偏离了当下需求。

items.situation: classmate asking to borrow lecture notes
items.speaker: I was sick and missed yesterday's whole lecture.

options.A: The lecture hall was freezing cold yesterday.
options.B: I'll email you my notes this afternoon.
options.C: Being sick is really no fun at all.
options.D: Did the professor cancel the lecture too?

items.explanation: 正确答案 B 不停留在对方的陈述上，而是主动解决其潜在需求——发笔记过去，符合 context_shift 范式。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"lecture"描述教室太冷，没提供帮助。C 是离题但合语法的同情话，但本质上是该避免的"自然回应"以外的空泛感慨，并未推进解决问题。D 是答错问题类型，把缺课的陈述转成是否停课的反问，偏离对方真正的需要。

items.situation: student checking bus or shuttle schedule
items.speaker: Why does the shuttle skip the north dorms?

options.A: The shuttle was painted bright blue last month.
options.B: Yes, the north dorms are pretty far away.
options.C: Did you check the updated route map online?
options.D: Every shuttle leaves from the main gate.

items.explanation: 正确答案 C 用反问推进对话，提示对方查看更新后的线路图以解开疑问，是自然有帮助的回应。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"shuttle"描述其外观颜色，与原因无关。B 是答错问题类型，问"为什么"却用 yes 加距离评论作答。D 是离题但合语法，讲所有班车的发车点，并未解释为何跳过北宿舍。

items.situation: student asking about gym or sports facility hours
items.speaker: I'm hoping to swim before my morning class.

options.A: Swimming is great exercise for your back.
options.B: The pool was just repainted last week.
options.C: Did you bring your goggles with you?
options.D: Well, the pool doesn't open until nine.

items.explanation: 正确答案 D 以话语标记"Well"开头，间接告知泳池九点才开门，这恰好回应了对方想在早课前游泳的打算。A 是语义联想陷阱，抓住"swim"泛谈游泳的好处，没回应时间问题。B 也是语义联想陷阱，抓住"pool"讲粉刷情况，无关紧要。C 是答错问题类型，把对方的打算转成是否带泳镜的反问，偏离开放时间这一核心。
